subject: Ops note: ragdoll deployment schedule for Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q2 review | INIT-8893
body: Following yesterday's call, the ragdoll effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Alexander Fleming seems to disagree with Frida Kahlo on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-8893. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
